title: HoS Ryoshu and Some Misc Updates

texts: Added Blade of the House of Spiders Ryoshu.
Added support for Threadspin 5 across the site and added 4th Match Flame's TS5 info.

Implemented a large amount of alternative names to most identities and E.G.Os. They should come up in search bars when searching for those names. The initial set is primarily NPCs that ids are based on, Abno names, and some commonly used abbreviations. Shorter versions of names that are just mashups of the original name plus the sinner name may be excluded since you can already search for them with the original name. Feel free to suggest more if you try something that doesn't show up.
Adjusted the groupings of links separating General into Community and Database and renaming Utility Tools to just Tools.
Renamed the Recent/Latest Additions sections on the homepage.
Added some rounding out to the edges of identity and ego icons when viewing or editing builds to make the corners look less harsh.
Fixed the alignment of identities and egos when editing builds so they don't misalign when selecting multiple egos.
Adjusted the size of the deployment order text to lessen the chance of it wrapping to 2 lines on thinner screens.
Reduced the max height of the table in the training calculator.
Reduced the size of the E.G.O hebrew letters when using the E.G.Os Compressed display type.
Stretched the height of Team Builds and MD Plans in search results so they align with the others in the same row even if their lower sections are empty.
